news.title:
PFC hits 52-week high, REC gains 5%; RBI proposes NBFC reforms.
Analyst sees upside for PFC, REC with key levels at ₹448 & ₹358.
news.summary:
PFC hits 52-week high, REC gains 5%; RBI proposes NBFC reforms.

news.title: PFC hits a 52-week high amid active trading.
news.summary: PFC hits a 52-week high amid active trading.

news.title:
PFC shares rise 5%, reaching a 52-week high of Rs 467.
Stock surges 29% in April as power demand boosts investor sentiment.
news.summary:
PFC shares rise 5%, reaching a 52-week high of Rs 467.
Stock surges 29% in April as power demand boosts investor sentiment.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd timely paid Rs. 1037.55 lakhs interest and Rs. 168500 lakhs principal due on bonds.
Payment details include ISIN INE134E08NQ8, frequency as yearly, and record date 30 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd timely paid Rs. 1037.55 lakhs interest and Rs. 168500 lakhs principal due on bonds.
Payment details include ISIN INE134E08NQ8, frequency as yearly, and record date 30 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp forms 4 SPVs for 765kV, 400kV transmission projects.
Projects are in Babai, Bikaner, Bidar, and Mandya to expand grid infrastructure.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp forms 4 SPVs for 765kV, 400kV transmission projects.
Projects are in Babai, Bikaner, Bidar, and Mandya to expand grid infrastructure.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation shows a breakout from descending trendline, forming higher lows.
Horizontal support holds as consolidation ends with flag breakout and weekly momentum shift.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation shows a breakout from descending trendline, forming higher lows.
Horizontal support holds as consolidation ends with flag breakout and weekly momentum shift.

news.title:
Ajit Mishra of Religare Broking recommends Bharti Airtel, Hindalco, and PFC for short-term gains amid market volatility.
Bharti Airtel targets ₹1,985, Hindalco ₹1,050, and PFC ₹490; cautious optimism advised with focus on sectoral strength.
news.summary:
Ajit Mishra of Religare Broking recommends Bharti Airtel, Hindalco, and PFC for short-term gains amid market volatility.
Bharti Airtel targets ₹1,985, Hindalco ₹1,050, and PFC ₹490; cautious optimism advised with focus on sectoral strength.

news.title:
Angel One's Osho Krishan advises buying FACT and PFC shares; FACT target 885-900, PFC target 445-450.
Nifty fell 0.71% to 23,822.45, Sensex dropped 0.93% to 76,847.10 amid Middle East tensions.
news.summary:
Angel One's Osho Krishan advises buying FACT and PFC shares; FACT target 885-900, PFC target 445-450.

news.title:
Govt may issue preference shares or fresh equity to retain 51% stake in PFC post REC merger.
FM announced PFC-REC restructuring in FY27 Budget to enhance scale and efficiency in public sector NBFCs.
news.summary:
Govt may issue preference shares or fresh equity to retain 51% stake in PFC post REC merger.
FM announced PFC-REC restructuring in FY27 Budget to enhance scale and efficiency in public sector NBFCs.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirmed timely payment of interest and principal for bonds as per SEBI norms.
Interest payment, originally due 03-Apr-2026, was processed on 04-Apr-2026 due to a government holiday.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirmed timely payment of interest and principal for bonds as per SEBI norms.
Interest payment, originally due 03-Apr-2026, was processed on 04-Apr-2026 due to a government holiday.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms proper use of proceeds from listed commercial papers as per SEBI guidelines.
Details of CPs issued and outstanding in Q4 FY25-26, including ISIN codes and maturity dates, are disclosed.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms proper use of proceeds from listed commercial papers as per SEBI guidelines.
Details of CPs issued and outstanding in Q4 FY25-26, including ISIN codes and maturity dates, are disclosed.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp's subsidiary, South Kalamb Power Transmission, sold to Adani Energy for ₹12.53 crore.
Sale is at arm's length, not a slump sale, with minimal revenue contribution.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp's subsidiary, South Kalamb Power Transmission, sold to Adani Energy for ₹12.53 crore.
Sale is at arm's length, not a slump sale, with minimal revenue contribution.

news.title:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.
news.summary:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd. confirms timely interest and principal redemption for bonds under SEBI Reg. 57(1).
Payments were made via NEFT/RTGS, covering bond series 7.66% and 7.70% on due dates as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd. confirms timely interest and principal redemption for bonds under SEBI Reg. 57(1).

news.title:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.
news.summary:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.

news.title:
Vedanta, PFC, and 10 others will go ex-date next week for dividends, bonuses, and stock splits.
India Glycols, Gujarat Intrux offer high dividends; Kilitch Drugs, Times Green announce 1:1 bonus issues.
news.summary:

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation declares Rs 4/share dividend with ex-date March 23, 2026.
The company shows returns of 8.5% in 6 months and 421.6% over 4 years.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation declares Rs 4/share dividend with ex-date March 23, 2026.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest redemption payment for bonds as per SEBI regulations.
Interest of Rs. 35.9 Cr was paid on bond series ISIN FNE134E08F06 due on 12/6/2026 via NEFT/RTGS.
news.summary:

news.title:
PFC board approves raising ₹1.6 lakh crore in FY26-27 via bonds, loans, CP.
PFC declares ₹3.25/share fourth interim dividend; record date 23 Mar 2026.
